app.name: GOLingo
app.description: Read stories, save vocabulary, practice with flashcards, and track your learning progress.

home.hero_title_prefix: A language learning method that is
home.hero_subtitle: Join 500 million learners with bite-sized, highly entertaining lessons. Practice speaking, reading, and listening every day in the most natural way.
home.bento_card1_desc: Learn vocabulary through context in stories, helping you understand and remember new words naturally and effectively.
home.bento_card2_desc: A flexible practice system with various exercise types to effectively consolidate knowledge.
home.bento_card3_desc: Learn languages for free forever. Our mission is to make high-quality education accessible to everyone.
home.bento_card4_desc: A rich story library with various topics suitable for all levels, helping you both entertain and improve your knowledge.
home.method_desc: Our courses teach reading, listening, and speaking skills in the most effective way. Let's explore our latest research!
home.method_feature1_desc: Golingo adapts to your style. Custom exercises to help you learn vocabulary most effectively.
home.method_feature2_desc: See results immediately after each answer. We will guide you on how to improve when you make mistakes.
home.method_feature3_desc: Earn rewards, unlock new levels, and track your progress daily.
home.cta_ready_desc: Join millions discovering the joy of language learning with Golingo.

auth.login_subtitle: Sign in to continue your learning journey
auth.register_subtitle: Join GOLingo and start learning English through stories
auth.password_too_short: Password must be at least 6 characters
auth.register_success: Account created successfully! Please sign in.
auth.forgot_password_desc: Enter your email address and we will send you a link to reset your password.
auth.forgot_success: A password reset link has been sent if the email exists.
auth.reset_password_desc: Please enter your new password below.
auth.missing_token_error: No password reset token was provided in the URL. Please request a new link.
auth.twofa_subtitle: Enter the 6-digit verification code from your authenticator app.
auth.scan_qr_desc: Scan the QR code below using your Google Authenticator, Authy, or Microsoft Authenticator app.
auth.verify_instructions_enable: Enter the 6-digit code generated by your authenticator app to complete the setup.
auth.verify_instructions_disable: Enter the 6-digit code from your authenticator app to confirm disabling two-factor authentication.

vocabulary.title: My Vocabulary
vocabulary.no_words: No words saved yet. Start reading stories to build your vocabulary!
vocabulary.delete_confirm: Are you sure you want to delete this word?

flashcard.title: Flashcard Practice
flashcard.session_complete: Great job! You've completed today's review.
flashcard.no_cards: No cards due for review. Come back later!
flashcard.completed_desc: You have successfully reviewed all active flashcards in this session.
flashcard.browse_completed_desc: You have finished browsing the flashcards in this session.
flashcard.no_due_desc: You have no due flashcards to review right now. Keep reading to save more words!
flashcard.rate_instruction: How well did you remember this word?

dashboard.title: Learning Center
dashboard.subtitle: Track your reading progress, streaks, and review cycles.
dashboard.streak_active: Keep the flame burning! Read or review today.
dashboard.streak_inactive: Start a new streak today by reviewing words!
dashboard.no_vocab: You haven't saved any vocabulary items yet. Highlight words while reading to save them!
dashboard.no_progress: No reading progress found yet. Dive into some stories to track your speed!
